hero.title: Engineering Systems That Scale
hero.subtitle: Software na Kasuwanci · AI & Machine Learning · Cloud Infrastructure · IoT & Edge
hero.description: Daga sarrafa kansa mai hankali zuwa dandamali na girgije, muna tsarawa da isar da fasahar da ke ba da ƙarfin kasuwanci - a kan lokaci, a kan kasafin kuɗi, a sikelin.
hero.trustLine: Amincewa da kamfanoni a duk duniya

services.subtitle: Ayyukanmu
services.title: Cikakken aikin injiniya
services.description: Yankunan motsa jiki guda shida. Ƙungiya ɗaya. Kowane ɓangare na fasahar ku tana da yawa - daga na'urori masu gefe zuwa dashboard na kasuwanci.

customSoftware.title: Ci gaban Software na al'ada
customSoftware.description: Aikace-aikacen zamani da aka gina tare da microservices, APIs, da gine-ginen girgije.

aiMl.title: AI, ML & Business Intelligence
aiMl.description: Bututun AI / ML, dashboards na Power BI, da nazari na ci gaba wanda ke juya bayanai zuwa yanke shawara.

cloud.title: Gine-gine na girgije da kayan more rayuwa
cloud.description: Kayan aikin girgije da yawa tare da kwantena, marasa uwar garke, da haɓakar duniya da aka gina a ciki.

iot.title: IoT & Edge Computing
iot.description: Na'urorin da aka haɗa, tagwayen dijital, da ƙididdigar ƙididdiga don masana'antu 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering
devops.description: CI / CD bututun, kayayyakin more rayuwa a matsayin lambar, da kuma observability daga sadaukarwa zuwa samarwa.

digital.title: Canjin Dijital & Shawarwari
digital.description: Dabarun fasaha, taswirar hanya ta zamani, da shawarwari na hannu.

cta.title: Bari mu gina wani abu mai tsanani.
cta.description: Daga haɓaka software na al'ada da mafita mai amfani da AI zuwa kayan aikin girgije da sarrafa kansa - muna ba da sabis na fasaha na ƙarshe wanda ya dace da bukatunku.

credibility.subtitle: Rikodin Rikodin Mu
credibility.title: Sakamako, ba <gradient>alkawura</gradient> ba
credibility.description: Daga Sarajevo zuwa Oslo, Amsterdam da Berlin. An kawo tsarin kamfanoni a kan lokaci, kowane lokaci.

atlascopco.label: Cloud IAM don Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Tsara kayan aikin farko na tushen girgije don Atlas Copco akan Azure Kubernetes, rage farashi yayin kiyaye bin kamfanoni.

orange.label: Orange Cyberdefense Platform
orange.outcome: Ci gaba da kayan aikin Azure Kubernetes, bututun CI / CD, da haɗin ServiceNow na al'ada don babban kamfanin cybersecurity na Turai.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Gina taswirar dandamali na GIS a cikin ƙasa a duk faɗin Jamus tare da gano karo da ke hana lalacewar miliyoyin Yuro.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub yana sarrafa dubban na'urori, Synapse yana sarrafa biliyoyin layukan telemetry, tare da haɗuwa da gefen rage farashin saƙo da ~ 90%.

drone.label: Dandalin Drone mai sarrafa kansa
drone.outcome: Mai kula da jirgin sama na al'ada tare da gadar 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub wanda ke ba da damar jiragen BVLOS masu zaman kansu don sa ido kan aikin gona da isar da lodi.

payment.label: Payment System Rescue
payment.outcome: Ceto ƙofar biyan kuɗi don aikace-aikacen wayar hannu na Norway ta hanyar juya lambar gado mara izini. Zero biya downtime post-modernization.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Gina Maya plugin wanda ya yanke samfurin 3D da lokacin rayarwa da kashi 50% a babban ɗakin studio na AAA, wanda aka karɓa azaman kayan aiki na yau da kullun a cikin bututun samarwa.

social.label: Dandalin zamantakewar zamantakewa na tushen wuri
social.outcome: An tsara aikace-aikacen ƙawancen ƙawancen don yanayin rayuwar dare na Spain tare da daidaitawa na geolocation, saƙonnin lokaci na ainihi, da sanarwar turawa don abokin ciniki na Burtaniya.

iga.label: Multi-Tenant IGA Platform
iga.outcome: Gina core backend don dandamali na sarrafa ainihi na girgije wanda ke hidimar abokan ciniki na Fortune 500 tare da al'ada ASP.NET Core Identity don NoSQL a sikelin kasuwanci.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Adjacent, Global Delivery
euAdjacent.description: CET na aiki tare da ƙwarewar da ta shafi Norway, Netherlands, Jamus, da bayan.

yourEngineers.title: Injiniyoyinku, ba mai sayarwa ba
yourEngineers.description: Membobin ƙungiyar sadaukarwa da aka saka a cikin aikinku da kayan aikinku. Babu manajojin asusun, babu layin tikiti.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware zuwa girgije
hardwareToCloud.description: Daga firmware na na'urar da aka saka zuwa bututun Azure Synapse na kasuwanci. Cikakkiyar hanyar zuwa Labari: Ni daga mac » apple » Noticias » Cikakken software a cikin kowane shimfidar wuri

partners.subtitle: Tari na fasaha
partners.title: Tari <gradient>da aka</gradient> gwada yaƙi
partners.description: Ba wai kawai muna amfani da waɗannan kayan aikin ba - mun aika da tsarin samarwa tare da su. Daga Microsoft Azure zuwa Kubernetes, injiniyoyinmu suna riƙe da ƙwarewar duniya.

cloudInfra.label: Cloud & Infrastructure
cloudInfra.description: Multi-girgije gine-gine tare da orchestration na kwantena da kayan more rayuwa azaman lambar.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.description: Tsarin ɓangaren zamani tare da nau'in aminci da ingantaccen kayan aikin gini.

backend.label: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Dandamali na uwar garke na kamfanoni, harsunan tsarin, da tsarin API na zamani.

data.label: Bayanai da Ajiya
data.description: Dangantaka, takardu, da kuma ajiyar ajiya tare da cikakken rubutu search.

devops.label: DevOps & Tooling
devops.description: Bututun CI/CD, sarrafa sigar, da haɓaka haɓakawa.

cloudNative.title: Girgije ta hanyar tsoho
cloudNative.description: Kowane aikin an tsara shi da kwantena, CI / CD, kuma an gina shi don sikelin kwance daga rana ta farko.

fullStack.title: Cikakken Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: Daga React frontends zuwa .NET microservices zuwa ƙungiyoyin Kubernetes - ƙungiya ɗaya, ƙarshe zuwa ƙarshe.

productionProven.title: Production-Proven
productionProven.description: Waɗannan ba fasahar demo ba ce. Kowane kayan aikin da aka lissafa yana ba da ƙarfin tsarin gaske wanda ke hidimar masu amfani na ainihi a yau.

faq.subtitle: Tushen Ilimi
faq.title: <gradient>Tambayoyi</gradient> akai-akai
faq.description: Duk abin da kuke buƙatar sani game da aiki tare da Horizon Tech

scope.question: Menene aikin ku?
scope.answer: Muna ba da ayyukan fasaha na ƙarshe zuwa ƙarshe: software na kasuwanci na al'ada, bututun AI / ML, kayan aikin girgije, tsarin IoT, sarrafa kansa na DevOps, da shawarwarin canjin dijital. Ko kuna buƙatar cikakken dandamali da aka gina daga karce ko haɗin da aka yi niyya tare da tarinku na yanzu, muna kula da gine-gine, haɓakawa, gwaji, da aikawa.

stack.question: Menene ainihin fasahar ku?
stack.answer: Babban tarinmu yana mai da hankali kan dandamali na kasuwanci: Azure da AWS don girgije, .NET da Node.js don backend, React da Angular don frontend, Kubernetes da Docker don orchestration, da Terraform don kayan more rayuwa azaman lambar. Hakanan muna aiki sosai tare da Python don ayyuka na AI / ML, Power BI da Fabric don bayanan kasuwanci, da PostgreSQL, SQL Server, da MongoDB don bayanai.

enterprise.question: Ta yaya kuke gudanar da ayyukan kasuwanci?
enterprise.answer: Kowane haɗin gwiwa yana farawa tare da matakin ganowa don ayyana iyaka, gine-gine, da abubuwan da suka faru. Kuna samun ƙungiyar sadaukarwa tare da jagorancin fasaha, bita na yau da kullun, da kuma samun dama kai tsaye ga injiniyoyin da ke gina tsarinku. Muna bin sprints masu sauri tare da demos na masu ruwa da tsaki, kula da allon aikin bayyane, da kuma samar da rahotannin ci gaba na mako-mako.

support.question: Yaya tallafin bayan ƙaddamarwa yake?
support.answer: Muna ba da matakan tallafi da aka tsara tare da ƙayyadaddun SLAs, gami da saka idanu na 24/7, amsar abin da ya faru, haɓaka aiki, da ƙididdigar fasali. Yarjejeniyoyinmu na tallafi sun haɗa da gyaran kwari, facin tsaro, haɓaka ababen more rayuwa, da duba lafiyar jiki - wanda aka tsara don lokacin ku da buƙatun lokacin amsawa.

integration.question: Shin zaku iya haɗawa tare da abubuwan more rayuwa na yanzu?
integration.answer: Tabbas. Mun ƙware a cikin zamani na gado, haɗin API-farko, da ƙaura na girgije. Ko kuna buƙatar haɗi zuwa tsarin ERP na kan wuri, ƙaura daga monoliths zuwa microservices, ko haɗuwa da bayanan gado tare da frontends na zamani, muna da littattafan ƙaura da ƙwarewar haɗin gwiwa don sanya shi ba tare da matsala ba.

industries.question: Waɗanne masana'antu kuka yi aiki a ciki?
industries.answer: Ourungiyarmu ta isar da ayyuka a duk faɗin fintech, kiwon lafiya, kayan aiki, kasuwancin e-commerce, makamashi, da ɓangarorin gwamnati. Mun fahimci buƙatun masana'antu kamar PCI-DSS don biyan kuɗi, la'akari da HIPAA don bayanan kiwon lafiya, bin GDPR don kasuwannin EU, da kuma telemetry na ainihi don IoT na masana'antu.

engagement.question: Yaya tsarin haɗin gwiwa yake?
engagement.answer: Yana farawa tare da kiran ganowa don fahimtar manufofinku da yanayin fasaha. Daga can, muna isar da takaddar scoping tare da shawarwarin gine-gine, jadawalin, da rushewar saka hannun jari. Da zarar an amince da shi, muna farawa tare da ƙungiyar sadaukarwa, a cikin kayan aikinku da ayyukanku, kuma mu fara gudu na farko a cikin kwanaki.

faq.ctaDescription: Shin kuna da wani shiri a zuciya? Bari muyi magana game da iyakar, jadawalin, da kasafin kuɗi.
